headline: Ship signal jamming, a global threat made worse by Strait of Hormuz crisis
description: Electronic interference with cargo ships' navigation and positioning signal systems has surged since the Middle East conflict started. This comes together with cases of identity spoofing, which is used to evade sanctions.

headline: Pope Leo XIV calls for 'disarming AI'
Heatwave in France: 'This is an unprecedented event, with about a one-in-1,000 chance of occurring in a given year'
Russia threatens more strikes on Kyiv
description: Moscow said Monday it planned to target the city's 'decision-making centers' and repeated a call for foreign citizens and diplomats to leave the city. Western diplomatic missions in the city have rebuffed the warning.

headline: France's film funding agency targeted by the far right
description: Without the National Center for Cinema and the Moving Image, many French films could never be made. But the CNC is now under attack, which could spell the end of this nearly 80-year-old institution if the far-right Rassemblement National comes to power.

headline: France and Mali's pro-independence rebels: A history shaped by alliances and mutual interests
description: Bamako's military junta has accused Paris of supporting the Azawad Liberation Front (ALF), which launched an offensive in northern Mali at the end of April. These claims are based on the French authorities' historical ties with the pro-independence rebel groups, though those connections have since weakened.

headline: Caen's former prison goes on sale: 'It's strange, but it really has character'
description: Residents living near the former prison in Normandy, which has stood empty since 2023 and is now being put up for sale by the French state, have rallied to ensure it is not completely demolished. Buyers, who have until the end of May to submit their bids, will be required to prioritize the preservation of the historic building.

Why dropping the worst-case climate scenario does not undermine the reality of global warming
description: A new generation of climate scenarios has set aside RCP8.5, which projected a nearly 5°C rise in global temperatures by 2100. Donald Trump presents this as proof of 'alarmism' among climate scientists, but the new projections remain highly concerning.

headline: Five arrested over smuggling of Californian cannabis to France
description: A former influencer known as 'PA7' and a counterfeiter known as 'the Prince of Fake Luxury Watches' are suspected of having illegally imported hundreds of kilograms of 'Cali' marijuana.

headline: The alleged murder plot casting a new shadow over French-Algerian ties
description: Four suspects in the attempted murder of Algerian opposition figure Hichem Aboud in Roubaix, northern France, in May 2025 were indicted. This threatens to complicate the resumed dialogue between Paris and Algiers.
